subject: Re: [chatmcp/mcpso] Submit Your MCP Servers here (Issue #1)
body:
carloshpdoc left a comment (chatmcp/mcpso#1)

**memorydetective** — iOS leak hunting + performance investigation MCP server.

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/memorydetective
- GitHub: https://github.com/carloshpdoc/memorydetective
- MCP Registry: \`io.github.carloshpdoc/memorydetective\`
- License: Apache-2.0
- Latest: v1.16.0
- Platform: macOS (depends on \`leaks(1)\` + \`xctrace\`)

**41 MCP tools** across two surfaces:

- **Memgraph side** (cycle detection): \`analyzeMemgraph\`, \`findCycles\`, \`classifyCycle\` (36-pattern retain-cycle catalog with Swift \`fixTemplate\` snippets), \`findRetainers\`, \`countAlive\`, \`diffMemgraphs\`, \`verifyFix\` (per-pattern PASS/FAIL with abandoned-memory fallback), \`analyzeAbandonedMemory\` (KVO / NotificationCenter / cache shapes that escape \`leaks(1)\`), \`renderCycleGraph\` (Mermaid / DOT export).
- **Trace side** (\`.trace\` analysis): \`inspectTrace\`, \`summarizeTrace\` (single-call cross-schema synthesis returning markdown card), \`analyzeHangs\` (with main-thread violation classifier), \`analyzeAnimationHitches\`, \`analyzeTimeProfile\`, \`analyzeAllocations\`, \`analyzeAppLaunch\`, \`analyzeNetworkActivity\`, \`analyzeMemoryFootprint\`, \`analyzeEnergyImpact\`, \`analyzeLeakTimeline\`, \`compareTracesByPattern\` (CI gate on hangs / hitches / launch regressions).

**Verify-fix workflow**: \`bootAndLaunchForLeakInvestigation\` + \`replayScenario\` (with optional per-step screenshot capture) + \`captureScenarioState\` + \`compareTracesByPattern\` close the before/after loop in a single agent chain.

**CI-friendly**: \`detectLeaksInXCTest\` + \`detectLeaksInXCUITest\` ship self-contained HTML reports for PR-gate use. Generic CLI runner \`memorydetective tool <name> --input input.json\` for use without an MCP client.

**macOS 26.x workarounds baked in**: structured \`workaroundNotice\` on \`captureMemgraph\` for the \`task_for_pid\` regression, pre-flight probe + auto-open Instruments on the xctrace \`--time-limit\` wedge, and v1.16 \`recordViaInstrumentsApp\` which wraps the Instruments.app GUI flow when the CLI path is broken.

**Source bridging**: \`swiftGetSymbolDefinition\`, \`swiftGetSymbolsOverview\`, \`swiftFindSymbolReferences\`, \`swiftSearchPattern\`, \`swiftGetHoverInfo\` via SourceKit-LSP.

The MCP Registry already lists this server. Adding the mcp.so entry rounds out distribution. Thanks!

--
